# Fountain of Scale
> Done-for-you automation systems for small businesses.

Fountain of Scale builds and runs automation systems so small business owners stop losing revenue to manual work: follow-ups, lead capture, review replies, appointment reminders, and website replacement. Free to start.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://fountainofscale.com/
- Website replacement: https://fountainofscale.com/fix-your-page
- Review reply automation: https://fountainofscale.com/review-reply
- HVAC contractor automation: https://fountainofscale.com/hvac
- Home service contractor automation: https://fountainofscale.com/contractors
- Real estate agent automation: https://fountainofscale.com/real-estate
- Restaurant automation: https://fountainofscale.com/restaurant
- Beverage shop automation: https://fountainofscale.com/beverage
- Blog: https://fountainofscale.com/blog
